problem:
<image>
There is a word under the painting at the right side of the picture, what is its etymology word from old french? (you can first use python code to crop related area to see what the word is, then use web search and visit website to find the answer)

<image>
 What is the usage of this painting? (you can use image search to find the website containing the image, and visit that website to find the answer)

<image>
How many stars are there on the national flag of Samoa, Papua New Guinea and Bosnia? (you can search and observe related images to find the answer)

<image>
What are the approximate coordinates of the intersection point formed when the two sets of colored points are fitted into two lines? (you can use code interpreter to edit the image to find the answer)

<image>
A wedge with an inclination angle of $\theta$ is placed on a horizontal tabletop, as shown in the figure. An object of mass $m$ is placed on the inclined surface of the wedge, and the wedge itself also has a mass of $m$. The coefficient of friction between the object and the wedge, as well as between the wedge and the tabletop, is $\mu = 0.2$. Determine the range of values of $\theta$ for which the object slides down the incline while the wedge remains stationary (The final answer digits should be rounded to 3 decimal places. You can use code interpreter to calculate the answer)
